analysis.reasoning: Core message: An on-demand video service partnered with the Smithsonian to offer a free series on Washington, D.C., bringing U.S. history to people at home during COVID-19. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) — indirectly supported, as it highlights access to U.S. history and implies value in the nation’s historical legacy, but without explicit praise; still, it showcases historical content as significant, which fits. US2 (admirable society) — no emphasis on diverse groups, civil society broadly, companies beyond a neutral partnership, or military heroes. US3 (hostile enemies) — no adversaries mentioned. US4 (force for good) — not about human rights or global support. US5 (great international ally) — no ally relations. US6 (at the forefront) — not positioning the U.S. as a leader in technology/economy; it’s a cultural/educational offering. Conclusion: Only US1 applies.
